label: Drop column bio from user
summary: Drops extra column bio from table user

precheck.sql:
SELECT EXISTS (
  SELECT 1
  FROM information_schema.columns
  WHERE table_schema = 'public'
    AND table_name = 'user'
    AND column_name = 'bio'
)

postcheck.sql:
SELECT NOT EXISTS (
  SELECT 1
  FROM information_schema.columns
  WHERE table_schema = 'public'
    AND table_name = 'user'
    AND column_name = 'bio'
)

label: Create table post
summary: Creates table post with required columns

execute.sql:
CREATE TABLE "public"."post" (
  "id" uuid NOT NULL,
  "title" text NOT NULL,
  "userId" uuid NOT NULL,
  "createdAt" timestamptz DEFAULT (now()) NOT NULL,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id")
)
